🌸 Happy Father's Day 2026

To the Greatest
Papa in the World

♥

Every moment with you is a treasure we carry forever

💖 We Love You, Papa 💖
A message from the heart

Papa, there are a thousand words we could say, and still none of them would be enough. You are the reason we feel safe in this world — the anchor when life gets stormy, the light when everything feels dark. You never made sacrifices feel like sacrifices. Every long day you worked, every worry you quietly carried so we wouldn't have to, every time you chose us without us even knowing — that is the kind of love that shapes a person's whole life. We have grown up watching you be steady and strong, yet so tender in the ways only a father can be. The way you carry a little one on your shoulders at the top of a mountain, or sit beside us on a Mumbai evening just being present, or show up to every celebration dressed your best just for us — those moments are the ones we will hold in our hearts when we are old. You taught us what it means to love without conditions, to celebrate life's small joys with as much warmth as the big ones. Today we want you to know — being your children is the greatest gift we have ever received. You are our favourite person, our first hero, our forever home. Thank you, Papa, for everything you are.

— With all our love, always 💕

Our Favourite Memories

Moments that made us who we are

💖 💕 💖

You are our entire world, Papa

Happy Father's Day — today and every day 🌸

June 2026
